backstory.original: Born into the royal family of Celene, he assumed the simple name of Melf eschewing a life of comfort as a noble to study the arcane arts and train as a swordsman. He delved in the dungeons of Castle Greyhawk, the Lost Caverns of Tsojcanth and many other harrowing places honing his skills, knowledge and amassing powerful magical items. Melf sees himself as a weapon of weal hurtling toward the heart of the darkest evils in the realm. He is opinionated and has a touch of conceit that he is blissfully ignorant of possessing.
backstory.display: 出生在塞莱涅皇室，他取了个简单的名字马友夫。他放弃了贵族的安逸生活去学习奥术，训练自己成为了一名剑士。他行遍灰鹰堡的地下城、佐坎斯的迷失洞窟和其他许多痛苦之地，磨练自己的技能、知识，积攒强大的魔法物品。马友夫将自己看作是一件正义的武器，朝着王国最黑暗的邪恶中心急速前进。他很有主见，并且有一丝自负，但自己并不知晓这一点。

description.original: Melf leaps out and attacks the nearest enemy with his magic spear. If he has any Minute Meteors active, he fires one at a random enemy as well.
description.display: 马友夫跳起用他的魔法长矛攻击距离最近的敌人。如果他有激活的微流星，还会向一名随机敌人发射一颗。

longDescription.original: Melf leaps out and attacks the nearest enemy with his magic spear. If he has any Minute Meteors active, he fires one at a random enemy as well.
longDescription.display: 马友夫跳起用他的魔法长矛攻击距离最近的敌人。如果他有激活的微流星，还会向一名随机敌人发射一颗。

description.original: Melf summons six Minute Meteors that float around him. They are fired when he attacks normally and deal AOE BUD-based damage.
description.display: 马友夫召唤六个微流星漂浮在他身边。他进行普通攻击时微流星也会发动攻击，造成基于基础杀招伤害的范围伤害。

longDescription.original: Melf summons six Minute Meteors that float around him. They are fired when he attacks normally and deal AOE BUD-based damage.
longDescription.display: 马友夫召唤六个微流星漂浮在他身边。他进行普通攻击时微流星也会发动攻击，造成基于基础杀招伤害的范围伤害。

name.display: 马友夫的自适应援助法术

description.original: Melf creates a custom spell that buffs the formation partially based on who is in it.
description.display: 马友夫自创的法术，根据阵型中的勇士来提供部分增益。

name.display: 马友夫的强化支援法术

description.original: Melf provides speed boosts to help you power through areas faster than ever!
description.display: 马友夫提供速度增益，帮助你以前所未有的速度通关区域！

name.display: 马友夫的自适应援助法术

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions adjacent to Melf by $adaptive_support_base_value%. Effect increased by 50% if another elf is in the formation. Effect range increased by 2 if Melf is not in the front-most or rear-most columns. Effect increased by 25% for each unique species in the formation. ^$adaptive_support_description
所有与马友夫相邻的勇士提升 $adaptive_support_base_value% 伤害。如果阵型中有另一名精灵，则效果提升 50%。如果马友夫未处于阵型的最前列或最后列，则效果范围提升 2 格。阵型中每有一个独特种族，则效果提升 25%。^$adaptive_support_description
Melf knows exactly what evil is. Whenever an enemy spawns it has a 50% chance of being deemed "evil" by Melf. Enemies that are deemed evil take $amount% more damage from all Ultimate attacks.
马友夫深知邪恶的本质。当一名敌人刷新时，有 50% 几率被马友夫视为“邪恶”。被视为邪恶的敌人受到的所有杀招伤害提升 $amount%

Melf provides a random speed-up buff. The buff provided changes after every 50th area and draws from these three possibilities:^- $(buffed_number 25)% chance to spawn additional enemies.^- Increased enemy spawn speed by $(buffed_number 25)%. ^- $(buffed_number 25)% chance of increased quest drops.^$speedy_suppliment_description
马友夫会提供随机加速增益。每通过 50 个区域，该增益就会改变性质，并从以下三种可能中随机出现其一：^- 有 $(buffed_number 25)% 几率刷新额外敌人。^- 提升敌人刷新速度 $(buffed_number 25)%。^- 有 $(buffed_number 25)% 几率提高任务物品掉落^$speedy_suppliment_description

tipText.original: Melf provides a speed boosting ability, potentially switching it up every 50 areas to keep things fresh.
tipText.display: 马友夫提供速度提升能力，每50个区域就有可能切换一次，以保持精力。

description.desc: Unlocks Melf's Ultimate Attack - Melf's Minute Meteors
解锁马友夫的杀招：马友夫微流星

specializationDescription.original: Focus Melf's efforts on improving the formation's damage through his Adaptive Support Spell.
specializationDescription.display: 马友夫专注于通过强化支援法术来提高阵型的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Focus Melf's efforts on increasing the speed the formation progresses at through his Speedy Supplement.
specializationDescription.display: 马友夫专注于通过速度增强来加快阵型的进展速度。

specializationDescription.original: Focus Melf's efforts on defeating evil. Or at least, evil as he sees it with his Righteous Determination.
specializationDescription.display: 马友夫专注于击退邪恶。或者至少是他的正义决心判定的邪恶。

name.display: 马友夫的强化支援法术

description.desc: Increases the effect of Adaptive Support by $amount___2% on the non-dominant gender in the formation. Increase the effect of Adaptive Support by $amount% for each slot away a champion is from Melf.^^$(augmented_support_description)
自适应援助在对队伍中性别占少数的勇士使用时，效果提升 $amount___2%。任意勇士距离马友夫每远 1 格，自适应援助的效果就提升 $amount%^^$(augmented_support_description)

tipText.original: Melf creates a customized support spell to buff the formation partially based on the Champions placed into it.
tipText.display: 马友夫创造定制的支援法术，依据勇士在阵型中的位置提供部分增益。

description.original: Prince Brightflame is nothing if not selfless!
description.display: 光焰王子如果不够无私，他就一无是处！

description.original: Yes, I am.
description.display: 是的，我是。

description.original: I've got your back, as long as you've got mine.
description.display: 只要你掩护我，我就会掩护你。

description.original: I've trained many mages, though never so many at once!
description.display: 我训练过很多法师，但从来没有同时训练过这么多！

description.original: Yes, yes. We'll get there in time. Don't worry so much!
description.display: 是的，是的，我们会准时到达。别太担心！

description.original: They won't be snickering for long.
description.display: 他们不会得意太久了。

description.original: Stick with me, and we'll probably make it out alive.
description.display: 跟紧我，我们联手或许能够活着离开这个地方。

description.original: You've heard the tales, now watch me work.
description.display: 你们应该听过传说了，下面就来看我实际演示一下。

description.original: You can't just leave them in the box, can you?
description.display: 不能就这么放在盒子里吧？

description.original: Rally to me, friends. We will survive this, and glory shall be ours.
description.display: 向我靠拢，朋友们！我们会挺过去的，荣耀属于我们。

description.original: With every step, every breath, I strive to create a better world for all.
description.display: 每一次迈步、每一口呼吸，我都在努力为所有人创造一个更美好的世界。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Melf's Specializations by 80%

description.original: A spear I found in the lost caverns. No not Tsojcanth, just your everyday type.
description.display: 这是我在失落洞穴中找到的长矛。不，并不是索吉卡斯失落洞窟，就只是很普通的洞穴。

description.original: It's good for solo adventuring and I can keep my off hand free for somatic gestures.
description.display: 适合单独行动时使用，这样我空闲出来的另一只手就可以施展施法姿势了。

description.original: It's good to have standoff from your enemies, and it doubles as a 10-foot pole.
description.display: 适合抵御一群敌人，因为你可以把它当作十尺长杆用。

description.original: This powerful item can shrink to the size of a needle or grow as long as a polearm.
description.display: 此魔法物品可以缩小成细针，也可膨胀成长枪。

description.original: A seasoned adventurer needs few things, but a shield is one of them.
description.display: 经验丰富的冒险者并不需要太多的装备，但盾牌绝对是必备品之一。

description.original: It heralds my arrival, heartening the forces of weal and forewarning my foes of their doom.
description.display: 此盾宣告着我的降临，既能振奋友军的军心，亦能瓦解敌人的斗志。

description.original: This symbol is known throughout the Kingdom of Celene.
description.display: 此徽记在赛琳王国是家喻户晓的标志。

description.original: Melf is a simple name, as good as any. I let my deeds speak for me.
description.display: 马友夫是个很普通的名字。我会用我的行动来证明自己。

description.original: I thought it was near the entrance, but now I can't find it!
description.display: 我记得是放在门口边的，但现在却找不到了！

description.original: Here I am. Or am I here?
description.display: 我在这。或者是在这？

description.original: For when you need a quick exit.
description.display: 在需要迅速撤退时会用到。

description.original: It hides my true power beneath its sinuous layers.
description.display: 把我真实的力量隐藏在错综复杂的面纱下。

description.original: They always have the most complex spells.
description.display: 这种魔法书往往记录着最复杂的法术。

description.original: Weapon speed factors? Yes. I believe there is a reference here.
description.display: 武器速度因数？对。这里头似乎有相关记载。

description.original: It's got a rare gem every few pages, but it's mostly old hat.
description.display: 每翻几页就会出现珍贵的宝石，不过其余大部分都是陈旧的帽子。

description.original: Evil is always working to destroy and create chaos. I stand to stop it.
description.display: 邪恶总会寻找就会制造混乱与破坏。我的使命就是阻挡他们。

description.original: Best if combined with mage armor.
description.display: 最适合搭配法师护甲一起穿。

description.original: My father gave it to me long ago. It's quite patched, but it's still in good order.
description.display: 这是很久以前父亲给我的。虽然缝补过，但整体状态还是可以的。

description.original: I prefer to be long gone before an enemy is close enough.
description.display: 我比较喜欢远距离杀伤敌人。

name.display: 马友夫的精灵族锁子甲

description.original: Thin, light, and ever so quiet. Perfect for a grey elf like myself.
description.display: 单薄、轻盈、悄无声息。简直是我这种灰精灵的绝配。

description.original: Don't be fooled by the name.
description.display: 不要被名字中的小给误导了。

description.original: Hey, did anyone see those gnolls?
description.display: 咦，有人看到那些豺狼人吗？

description.original: If you study hard kids, you too can unlock latent magical power!
description.display: 只要功夫深，你们也能觉醒强大的魔法力量的！

description.original: Watch out. This one goes BOOM.
description.display: 当心了。这次可是会爆炸的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Born into the royal family of Celene, he assumed the simple name of Melf eschewing a life of comfort as a noble to study the arcane arts and train as a swordsman. He delved in the dungeons of Castle Greyhawk, the Lost Caverns of Tsojcanth and many other harrowing places honing his skills, knowledge and amassing powerful magical items. Melf sees himself as a weapon of weal hurtling toward the heart of the darkest evils in the realm. He is opinionated and has a touch of conceit that he is blissfully ignorant of possessing.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Melf supports the formation in his own unique way, creating a special support spell that is tailor made for your formation. He also provides one of several powerful speed-ups.

event_upgrades.name: Melf's Adaptive Support Spell
event_upgrades.description: Melf creates a custom spell that buffs the formation partially based on who is in it.

event_upgrades.name: Melf's Speedy Supplement
event_upgrades.description: Melf provides speed boosts to help you power through areas faster than ever!

character_sheet_details.backstory: 出生在塞莱涅皇室，他取了个简单的名字马友夫。他放弃了贵族的安逸生活去学习奥术，训练自己成为了一名剑士。他行遍灰鹰堡的地下城、佐坎斯的迷失洞窟和其他许多痛苦之地，磨练自己的技能、知识，积攒强大的魔法物品。马友夫将自己看作是一件正义的武器，朝着王国最黑暗的邪恶中心急速前进。他很有主见，并且有一丝自负，但自己并不知晓这一点。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 马友夫以自己独特的方式为阵型提供辅助，能够针对不同阵型创造特殊的辅助法术。他也能提供几种强大的加速之一。

event_upgrades.name: 马友夫的自适应援助法术
event_upgrades.description: 马友夫自创的法术，根据阵型中的勇士来提供部分增益。

event_upgrades.name: 马友夫的速度增强
event_upgrades.description: 马友夫提供速度增益，帮助你以前所未有的速度通关区域！

event_upgrades.name: 马友夫的强化支援法术

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 向我靠拢，朋友们！我们会挺过去的，荣耀属于我们。

display.name: 标枪

original.name: Long Spear

display.name: 很长的长矛
display.description: 适合抵御一群敌人，因为你可以把它当作十尺长杆用。

original.name: Melf's Spear of Zagyg
original.description: This powerful item can shrink to the size of a needle or grow as long as a polearm.

display.name: 马友夫的萨奇克长矛
display.description: 此魔法物品可以缩小成细针，也可膨胀成长枪。

original.name: Sturdy Shield
original.description: A seasoned adventurer needs few things, but a shield is one of them.

display.name: 坚固的盾牌
display.description: 经验丰富的冒险者并不需要太多的装备，但盾牌绝对是必备品之一。

original.name: Acid Arrow Shield
original.description: It heralds my arrival, heartening the forces of weal and forewarning my foes of their doom.

display.name: 酸液箭盾
display.description: 此盾宣告着我的降临，既能振奋友军的军心，亦能瓦解敌人的斗志。

original.name: Prince Brightflame's Shield
original.description: This symbol is known throughout the Kingdom of Celene.

display.name: 耀焰王子的盾牌
display.description: 此徽记在赛琳王国是家喻户晓的标志。

original.name: Melf's Magical Shield
original.description: Melf is a simple name, as good as any. I let my deeds speak for me.

display.name: 马友夫的魔法盾
display.description: 马友夫是个很普通的名字。我会用我的行动来证明自己。

original.name: Misplaced Cloak
original.description: I thought it was near the entrance, but now I can't find it!

display.name: 丢失的斗篷
display.description: 我记得是放在门口边的，但现在却找不到了！

original.name: Entertaining Cloak
original.description: Here I am. Or am I here?

display.name: 娱乐斗篷
display.description: 我在这。或者是在这？

original.name: Cloak of Displacement
original.description: For when you need a quick exit.

display.name: 移位斗篷
display.description: 在需要迅速撤退时会用到。

original.name: Melf's Cloak of Illusions
original.description: It hides my true power beneath its sinuous layers.

display.name: 马友夫的幻术斗篷
display.description: 把我真实的力量隐藏在错综复杂的面纱下。

original.name: Ancient Spellbook
original.description: They always have the most complex spells.

display.name: 远古魔法书
display.description: 这种魔法书往往记录着最复杂的法术。

original.name: Old Tome
original.description: Weapon speed factors? Yes. I believe there is a reference here.

display.name: 古老书籍
display.description: 武器速度因数？对。这里头似乎有相关记载。

original.name: Boccob's Blessed Book
original.description: It's got a rare gem every few pages, but it's mostly old hat.

display.name: 博卡布的护佑之书
display.description: 每翻几页就会出现珍贵的宝石，不过其余大部分都是陈旧的帽子。

original.name: Melf's Striking Spellbook
original.description: Evil is always working to destroy and create chaos. I stand to stop it.

display.name: 马友夫的显著魔法书
display.description: 邪恶总会寻找就会制造混乱与破坏。我的使命就是阻挡他们。

original.name: Undershirt
original.description: Best if combined with mage armor.

display.name: 背心
display.description: 最适合搭配法师护甲一起穿。

original.name: Chain Shirt
original.description: My father gave it to me long ago. It's quite patched, but it's still in good order.

display.name: 链衬甲
display.description: 这是很久以前父亲给我的。虽然缝补过，但整体状态还是可以的。

original.name: Chainmail
original.description: I prefer to be long gone before an enemy is close enough.

display.name: 锁子甲
display.description: 我比较喜欢远距离杀伤敌人。

original.name: Melf's Elven Chainmail
original.description: Thin, light, and ever so quiet. Perfect for a grey elf like myself.

display.name: 马友夫的精灵族锁子甲
display.description: 单薄、轻盈、悄无声息。简直是我这种灰精灵的绝配。

original.name: Melf's Minute Meteor
original.description: Don't be fooled by the name.

display.name: 马友夫的小流星
display.description: 不要被名字中的小给误导了。

original.name: Melf's Streaking Meteor
original.description: Hey, did anyone see those gnolls?

display.name: 马友夫的疾流星
display.description: 咦，有人看到那些豺狼人吗？

original.name: Melf's Cracked Meteor
original.description: If you study hard kids, you too can unlock latent magical power!

display.name: 马友夫的碎流星
display.description: 只要功夫深，你们也能觉醒强大的魔法力量的！

original.name: Melf's Exploding Meteor
original.description: Watch out. This one goes BOOM.

display.name: 马友夫的爆流星
display.description: 当心了。这次可是会爆炸的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位男性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有感知大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%
使所有善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
